title: CLIFFHANGER + CAMERA-ASK — Will YOU help us find Ginger?
prompt: Tight head-on close-up on @beach-sunset — soft pastel sunset gradient blazing pink-orange behind the girls, gentle distant ocean roar. @Sara already CENTER-LEFT FOREGROUND seated cross-legged on a folded beach towel, holding the open @sara-notebook-rescue page up gently toward the camera with both hands, the 'MAGIC FOREST RESCUE PLAN' title and the hand-drawn map clearly visible to the kid watching. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both holding the notebook up gently. @Eva already CENTER-RIGHT FOREGROUND seated cross-legged on the towel right next to Sara, leaning gently in toward the camera, both hands softly clasped under her chin in cute wondering pose. Curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. Both girls turn their heads DIRECTLY toward the camera with bright warm friend-to-friend sparkle in their eyes. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara (gently lifting the notebook a tiny bit higher with both hands, warm friend-to-friend tone, eyes shining): "Will YOU help us find Ginger?" She holds her warm look at the camera for one full beat. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva (leaning in even closer beside Sara, eyes huge with cheerful wonder): "What kind of BOAT should we build?" Both girls hold their warm look at the camera together waiting cheerfully for the kid watching at home to answer out loud. Calm cheerful warm kid-show family ambiance throughout — gentle distant surf, soft seabirds. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both holding the notebook up. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both clasped under her chin. Both girls stay seated cross-legged on the towel throughout — no jumping, no leaping. The sand and notebook stay plain clean — no marks (other than the rescue plan drawing), no red, no liquid spills.
